stemHtml: Which of these statements about an auto-brake system is correct?

options.a: When the auto-brake system is inoperative, in general take-off is not allowed, because maximum manual braking does not achieve the same deceleration as the auto-brake system in the RTO mode
options.b: When using manual braking during taxiing, the auto-brake system remains armed
options.c: When a low auto-brake setting is used during landing use of reverse will not influence the brake temperature
options.d: On most aeroplanes the auto-brake system provides the capability to select a fixed landing distance
